prompt: Ship a new version of this package. The commit messages aren't great but the code is ready.

assertions.text: MINOR bump applied (new exported functions: batchProcess, withRetry)
Did not ask the user for clarification (determined bump from code diffs)
CHANGELOG entries reflect actual code changes, not just commit messages
package.json version uses strict 3-part semver (e.g., 2.2.0, not 2.2.0.0)
Commit message follows chore(release): X.Y.Z format
